body: Suresh bhai, aapne corporate thali package ke baare mein poochha — main ek draft lekar aati hoon. Mylari ka Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 already 3.2% CTR pe chal raha hai (peer average 2.5% se upar). Corporate bulk booking ke liye: 20+ pax, fixed slot 12–1pm, pre-paid — aur aap unhe direct WhatsApp order link de sakte ho. Main ek ready template draft kar deti hoon — bas GO bol do.
rationale: Merchant expressed active planning intent — switched to action mode immediately with concrete package structure. Uses live CTR data for specificity and effort externalization.

body: Kids yoga program ke liye quick structure: Zen Yoga ka CTR 6.2% hai (peer 4.5% se upar), matlab parents pehle se dhundh rahe hain. Format jo kaam karta hai: 4–6 saal + 7–12 saal alag batches, 45-min sessions, Mon-Wed-Fri, ₹1,999/month. First Month @ ₹499 offer kids pe bhi extend kar sakte ho. Main sign-up form + WhatsApp broadcast draft kar deti hoon. Shuru karein?
rationale: Active planning intent detected — action mode with concrete structure. Uses merchant's live CTR as social proof, pairs with existing ₹499 offer.

body: Hi Aditya, Karim's Salon ki taraf se — kal apni appointment hai 🙂 Agar timing change karni ho toh reply kar dena, hum adjust kar lenge. Dekhte hain kal!
rationale: Appointment-tomorrow trigger for lapsed-hard customer — soft warm reminder without hard sell. Goal is re-engagement.

body: Hi Riya, Beauty Lounge by Renu se — kal aapki appointment hai 💅 On time aayein toh slot pakka hai. Koi change ho toh bata dena!
rationale: Appointment reminder for active customer. Warm, no upsell — simple confirmation.

body: Apollo Health Plus ke liye summer shelf data: ORS demand +40%, sunscreen +38%, antifungal +45% — cold/cough -60%. Ab is hisaab se shelf reshuffle karein. Senior Citizen 15% OFF offer ORS + sunscreen combo pe extend karna strong hook hoga. Main WhatsApp broadcast draft kar deti hoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Seasonal demand data used as the hook — specific percentages from trigger payload. Loss aversion (cold stock sitting). Effort externalization.

body: Dr. Meera, IDA CDE webinar hai — 2 credit hours, free for IDA members. Aapka CTR abhi 2.1% hai (peer median 3.0%), aur last post 22 din purana hai. Webinar attend karke ek GBP post bana sakte hain 'Latest CE in implantology' angle se — yeh peer-trust build karta hai aur CTR push karta hai. Main webinar link + post draft dono ready kar deti hoon. Chahiye?
rationale: CDE opportunity tied to merchant's specific CTR gap and stale posts. Clinical-peer tone. Effort externalization.

body: Hi Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus se — aapki metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan refill lagbhag 28 April tak khatam ho jayegi. Ghar pe delivery chahiye? Address already save hai. Reply ORDER — aaj dispatch kar deti hoon.
rationale: Chronic refill with saved address. Maximum specificity (exact molecules, exact date). Effort externalization — one-word CTA.

body: Hi Vivaan, Dr. Sameer's clinic se — recent check-up ke baad follow-up ka waqt aa gaya hai. Iss hafte koi slot chahiye? Reply karein, hum fix kar dete hain.
rationale: New patient follow-up — gentle clinical tone, simple question to re-engage.

body: Dr. Meera, heads-up: Smile Studio 1.3 km door khula hai 8 April ko — Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Aapka ₹299 hold karna sahi hai — race-to-bottom nahi karni. Jo jaldi karna chahiye: stale posts update karna (22 din purane) aur 78 lapsed patients ka recall plan. Dono aaj draft kar sakti hoon. Chalega?
rationale: Real competitor data (name, distance, price, date) as specificity hook. Frames response as differentiation. Pivots to merchant's own lapsed patient data for action.

body: Mylari ke liye: ek naya South Indian cafe nearby khula hai. Best response abhi — Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 ko Google pe prominent rakho aur recent reviews reply karo. Main 3 review templates + fresh GBP post draft kar deti hoon. Reply YES.
rationale: Competitor trigger — defensible differentiation (GBP + reviews). Effort externalization.

body: Studio11 ke saath quick check-in: is hafte sabse zyada demand kaunsi service ki aa rahi hai — haircut, hair spa, ya kuch aur? Main aapke jawab se ek targeted WhatsApp broadcast draft karoongi. 10 second ka jawab, main baaki handle kar leti hoon.
rationale: Asking the merchant directly (compulsion lever). Frames their 10-second input as unlocking a full broadcast.

body: Mylari bhai, quick question: iss hafte kaunsa order type sabse zyada aa raha hai — dine-in, takeaway, ya corporate? Main next WhatsApp broadcast usi angle se draft karoongi. Aapka CTR peer average se upar hai — sahi message se aur push possible hai.
rationale: Merchant involvement lever. Live CTR as social proof. Personalizes next action to what's working.

body: Hi Rashmi, PowerHouse Fitness se — 57 din ho gaye, miss kar rahe hain! Weight loss goal yaad hai. Summer se pehle momentum pakadna easy hai — 3 FREE Trial Classes abhi bhi available hain. Kab aana comfortable rahega — weekday ya weekend?
rationale: Lapsed-hard winback — uses their goal (weight loss) as re-entry hook. Free trial removes friction. Simple slot question to reactivate.

body: Hi Reyansh, Dr. Asha Dental Care se — kaafi time ho gaya last visit ke baad. Cleaning ya check-up ke liye 6-monthly recall helpful hoti hai. Koi preferred time ho toh bata dena — hum slot fix kar dete hain.
rationale: Gentle patient recall — clinical, no pressure. Simple question to re-engage.

body: Hi Reyansh, Daily Care Medicos ki taraf se — pehle aaye the, hope sab theek hai. Regular medicines ya supplements ki zaroorat ho toh bata dena. Home delivery bhi available hai 😊
rationale: Pharmacy lapsed customer — warm, low-pressure check-in. Home delivery as easy re-entry hook.

body: Glamour Lounge ke saath 38 din se baat nahi hui — check in karne aayi hoon. Aapka CTR 2.2% hai (peer 4.0%) aur subscription ke baad se no active offers. Ek simple Haircut + Blowdry @ ₹299 offer aaj live karein? Peer salons mein yeh format sabse zyada engage karta hai. Main offer draft + GBP post ready kar deti hoon — bas YES bol do.
rationale: Dormant re-engagement — specific dormancy data (38d, CTR gap). Peer social proof. Effort externalization.

body: Chai Point Cafe se lambe time baad — kya sab theek chal raha hai? Summer mein Chandigarh mein iced chai aur lemon drinks demand badhti hai. Koi new offering plan kar rahe ho? Main menu suggestion + GBP post draft kar sakti hoon agar chaho.
rationale: Dormant merchant — seasonal curiosity hook. Soft re-engagement with work-for-you offer.

body: Studio11, Diwali 31 October ko hai — 188 din baaki hain. Early bird jo kaam karta hai: 'Diwali Ready' hair + skin packages October mein pre-book. Haircut @ ₹99 + Hair Spa @ ₹499 bundle karke limited pre-booking launch karein. Main package + WhatsApp campaign draft kar deti hoon?
rationale: Festival trigger — exact date + countdown. Existing offers bundled (no fabrication). Early-mover framing.

body: Bend & Burn, Diwali se pehle 'get fit' search surge hoti hai gyms ke liye. 3 FREE Trial Classes offer ko festive angle se promote karo ab. Main WhatsApp broadcast draft kar deti hoon. Chalega?
rationale: Festival + gym — festive fitness narrative. Uses existing free trial as hook.

body: Sunrise Medicos ke liye ek important step: GBP abhi unverified hai. Verified profiles ko 30% zyada clicks milti hain. Verification postcard ya phone call se hoti hai — 1-2 hafte. Shuru karein? Main step-by-step guide share kar deti hoon aur baad mein delivery setup bhi.
rationale: GBP unverified — 30% uplift from trigger payload as loss aversion. Effort externalization. Batches two quick wins.

body: SK Pizza Junction ke liye: aaj DC vs MI — Arun Jaitley Stadium, 7:30pm. IPL match wali shaam delivery orders mein spike hoti hai Delhi mein. Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free aaj valid hai — 'Watch DC vs MI, order free pizza' broadcast abhi bhejein? Main draft ready kar deti hoon. YES?
rationale: Real-time local event — specific match, venue, time. Existing offer repurposed with IPL hook. Tonight-only urgency.

body: Mylari, aap 145 reviews pe ho — sirf 5 aur aur 150 milestone complete! Kuch happy regulars ko aaj personally review request bhejo. Main WhatsApp template draft kar deti hoon — aap bas forward karo. Karo?
rationale: Milestone imminent (5 away from 150) — specific gap creates urgency. Effort externalization.

body: Pizza Spot, ek milestone aane wala hai — Google visibility ke liye important. Regular customers ko aaj review request bhejo — main WhatsApp template draft kar sakti hoon. Aap bas forward karo. Karo?
rationale: Milestone trigger — effort externalization + clear one-step action.

body: Dr. Bharat, important update: pichle 7 din mein calls 50% giri hain — baseline 12 calls tha. Renewal bhi 12 din mein hai. Abhi karna chahiye: GBP verify karein (unverified abhi) aur ek active offer launch karein — Dental Cleaning @ ₹199 strong hook hoga. Main dono draft karke bhejoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Severe perf dip + unverified GBP + renewal due — triple urgency. Specific metric. Two concrete recovery actions.

body: The Beauty Bar, calls ya bookings mein koi dip dikh rahi hai recently? Aapka CTR 5.8% hai (peer 4.0% se kaafi upar) — agar bookings slow hain toh usually offer gap ya stale content hoti hai wajah. Main profile audit karoon aur ek fresh offer draft karoon?
rationale: Perf dip + above-peer CTR — frames as fixable. Diagnostic question before action. Social proof (strong CTR) to reassure.

body: Zen Yoga, calls iss hafte 15% upar gayi hain — likely driver: kids yoga post. Yeh momentum pakad ke rakho: follow-up post + new monthly batch announcement abhi bhejo. First Month @ ₹499 kids angle se highlight karo. Main content + GBP post draft kar deti hoon. Chalega?
rationale: Perf spike with identified driver — validates what's working and pushes to double down. Specificity (15%, baseline 18). Effort externalization.

body: Sunrise Medicos, iss hafte performance mein improvement dikh rahi hai — yeh positive signal hai. GBP verification abhi bhi pending hai — is momentum mein shuru karna best rahega. Verification ke baad visibility aur badhegi. Shuru karein?
rationale: Perf spike momentum used to prompt long-pending GBP verification. Positive framing.

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic se 🦷 6 mahine ho gaye last cleaning ke — aapka recall due hai. 2 evening slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu — ya koi aur time batao.
rationale: 6-month cleaning recall for lapsed-soft patient. Exact slots from trigger payload. Hinglish matching patient pref. Two-choice booking CTA (allowed for booking flows per brief).

body: Hi Diya, Zen Yoga Studio se — kaafi time ho gaya! Aapka next session due hai. Kab comfortable hai — morning ya evening? Main book kar deti hoon.
rationale: Recall due for lapsed yoga member. Warm, non-pushy. Simple slot question removes friction.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI ne radiograph dose limit revise ki hai — deadline 15 December 2026. Aapke X-ray protocols update karne ki zaroorat ho sakti hai. Main DCI notification summary + compliance checklist draft kar deti hoon — aap apni practice ke liye review kar lena. Bhejoon?
rationale: Regulation change (urgency 4) — clinical-peer framing. Specific deadline (Dec 15). Effort externalization. No fabricated content.
